info.title: College Management System API
info.description: RESTful API for School Management System

get.summary: List admission heads

post.summary: Create a new Admission Head with Rules, Fees and Paper Limits
post.description: Stores Admission Head details, JSON criteria (Board, Gender, Category), Fee breakdown, and dynamic Paper selection rules.

min_credits.description: Minimum total credits required for this course

max_credits.description: Maximum total credits allowed for this course

fees.description: Fee breakdown using Fee Particulars table

admission_head_papers.description: Paper limit configuration (Required if allow_subject_paper_selection is true)

get.summary: Get full details of a specific Admission Head
get.description: Returns Admission Head details along with its Stream, Session, Fee Breakdown (Particulars), and Paper Configurations (MJC, MIC, etc.)

put.summary: Update an existing Admission Head configuration
put.description: Updates basic info, JSON criteria, and replaces old fee structures and paper limits with new ones.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the Admission Head to update

fees.description: Updating this will replace all existing fee particulars for this head.

admission_head_papers.description: Required if allow_subject_paper_selection is true. Replaces existing paper limits.

patch.description:
Updates the workflow status of an admission configuration.
     * 0: Draft - Configuration phase, not visible to students.
     * 1: Published - Active and visible for student applications.
     * 2: Unpublished - Temporarily hidden/disabled by Admin.
     * 3: Archived - Process completed or session expired.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the Admission Head

422.description: Validation Error - Invalid status value provided

post.description: Creates a copy of the admission head along with its fee structures and paper configurations as a 'Draft'.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the Admission Head to duplicate

message.example: Admission head duplicated as draft successfully

Enable/Disable verification for a specific stream

Export student verification data for a specific stream
Get admission analytics with multi-level filters
Get comprehensive dashboard analytics
get.description: Returns aggregated statistics for widgets and charts, including fee collection from all modules and admission type breakdown.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Filter data from this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Default is start of current year.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Filter data up to this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Default is today.

Step 1: Search Application details from Excel
Step 2: Send OTP to Email & Mobile
Step 3: Final Register (Save Excel details & Set Cookie)

post.description: Authenticate student using registered Email/Mobile and Password. Uses Cookie-based authentication.

login_id.description: Registered Email address or Mobile number

422.description: Validation error or Incorrect old password

get.summary: List all users with roles and filters

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Filter by role key (e.g., admin, student)

get.summary: Get a user

post.summary: Assign a role to a specific user
post.description: Assigns a role (like Admin, HOD, Staff) with an optional scope (Global, College, Department).

scope_id.description: ID of the college/dept if scope is not global

put.description: Updates specific fields of a Certificate Head configuration. Only provided fields will be updated.

parameters.description: ID of the Certificate Head to update

custom_fields.description: Full array of custom fields. Sending this will replace all existing fields for this certificate.

get.summary: View contact details and mark as read

View feedback and mark as read
List grievances with unified search and filters

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status (e.g., pending, open, closed)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Unified search by Ticket ID, Subject, or Student Name

200.description: Paginated list of grievances retrieved successfully

get.summary: Get grievance details
Get list of notices with pair filters

parameters.name: stream_id
parameters.description: Filter notices by specific Stream ID

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: Filter notices by specific Session ID

post.description: Stores a notice. If target_type is 'selective', you must provide a list of stream and session combinations.

description.example: The internal exams will be held in the last week of January.

combos.description: Required only if target_type is selective. Send pairs of stream and session IDs.

stream.description: ID of the specific Stream (e.g., BCA)

422.description: Validation Error - Check if combos are missing for selective target_type

get.summary: Get notice data for editing

put.description: Updates the notice details and refreshes the target combinations. Note: If final_publish is true, the notice is locked and cannot be updated.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the notice to update

description.example: The dates for BCA and BBA exams have been shifted by one week.

combos.description: The complete list of stream-session pairs. Existing pairs will be replaced by this list.

403.description: Forbidden - Occurs if the notice is already marked as final_publish

422.description: Validation Error - Invalid IDs or missing required fields

delete.description: Deletes the notice and its target mappings. Note: If final_publish is true, the notice cannot be deleted.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the notice to delete

403.description: Forbidden: Final published notice cannot be deleted

patch.description: Switch notice between Published and Draft status.
